description.en: Return a context manager that returns enter_result from __enter__(), but otherwise does nothing. It is intended to be used as a stand-in for an optional context manager, for example: def myfunction(arg, ignore_exceptions=False): if ignore_exceptions: # Use suppress to ignore all exceptions. cm = contextlib.suppress(Exception) else: # Do not ignore any exceptions, cm has no effect. cm = contextlib.nullcontext() with cm: # Do something An example using enter_result: def process_file(file_or_pat...
